# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Remove or correct the invalid 'ignore = Ignore' line in the flake8 configuration.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
find . -type f -name '*.cfg' -o -name '*.ini' | xargs grep -l 'ignore = Ignore' | xargs sed -i '/ignore = Ignore/d'
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
